h2: Breaking Five Fireplace Myths with Trending Today
DIY Electric Fireplace Installation with Architect Christine Nickerson
Gas Fireplace Makeover with The LKS Address

paragraphs: Our collaborations with tastemakers, influencers and media partners bring fire to the forefront. Together, we create and highlight spaces that not only warm homes but also spark inspiration for your own fireplace project. Explore how our collaborations redefine comfortable living.
Check out our segment and see how we brought our building community together to bust five common misconceptions about fireplaces in today’s market.

Hosted by Navy veteran and military advocate Montel Williams, Military Makeover brings together designers, decorators, home renovation experts, and key brand partners to transform the homes—and lives—of military families.
What complements a 100-inch TV better than a seven-foot custom fireplace?
Passionate about projects that enhance the character of her home, Christine Nickerson reimagines a traditional trend by adding the Inception electric fireplace to her dining room.
For Chicago-based influencers The LKS Address, upgrading the fireplace in their colonial home was a pivotal point in their home renovation.
We teamed up with another Minnesota-based company dedicated to high design. See how our partnership with Artful Living magazine highlights unique fireplaces in luxurious homes.
We’re always looking for people who help us push the boundaries of innovative fireplace design. Thinking about a fireplace project? Let’s see if we’d make a good fit!
